name: LVenture Group S.p.A.
summary: LVenture Group S.p.A. is a venture capital firm specializing in incubation, micro seed and seed investments. The firm invests in various market sectors, such as software-as-a-service, platform, gaming, marketplace and e-commerce, food fashion and design, advertising and events, internet of things and hardware. Within micro seed investments, it typically invests √Ç¬Ä0.08 million ($0.088 million) in early stage companies. Within seed investments, it typically invests up to √Ç¬Ä0.25 million ($0.27 million) in startups. The firm seeks investment in companies with enterprise value between $0.8 million to $5 million. Within micro seed investments, the firm takes a 9% stake in its portfolio companies. Within seed investments, it takes a minority stake as well. The firm makes investments out of personal capital. LVenture Group S.p.A. is based in Rome, Italy.
